title: Zerotekz's Blades of War 2
description: Adds 3D weapon/shield models to MC! (Custom Item Textures)
body:
# Update v1.9
For the upcoming **_1.21.5_** the pack will work right out of the box, **no mods needed!**

## New Solo Leveling Weapons!
![Solo Leveling](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20a6d89ca2d70950eed39e385071e818849ebe02_0.webp)

## New Spellbooks!
These books are magic Spellbooks, rename a crossbow to the name of the book u want!
Use colored fireworks as ammo and it will look like magic projectiles!

![Spellbooks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412dab2d449053ba1dab8377ca6f75c25272e796.png)

# Update v1.5

![v1.5](https://i.ibb.co/wdCfwGH/Bild-2025-01-09-172320842.png)
### **New Namelist!!:** [https://blades-of-war-2.webflow.io](https://blades-of-war-2.webflow.io)

# Showcase v1.0

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kLhpttvoL5w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

 - compatible & tested with [CIT-Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn) 1.16 - 1.21.1!
 - compatible & tested with [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) 1.16 - 1.21.3!
 - should work for all upcoming Minecraft versions since texturepack format doesnt change!
 - needs [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT-Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn) to work!
 - if u need help join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/CdawEAH4va)!

This pack includes unique weapons and shields! 
You get them by **renaming** your weapon or  shield in an **anvil** to the designated name in the **nameslist** or **spreadsheet**!  

Weapons with the **shield-icon** can block, 
(model can be applied to shields via renaming) so you can dual-wield them!
